name: @webtransport-bun/webtransport
description: Production-focused WebTransport for Bun with datagrams and streams via a Rust napi-rs addon

scripts.prebuild:native: cd ../.. && bun run build:native && mkdir -p packages/webtransport/prebuilds && cp crates/native/webtransport-native.*.node packages/webtransport/prebuilds/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run prebuild:native && npm run prebuild:checksums && npm run pack:check
